title: cyperorchis lowiana
intro: Cyperorchis lowiana, also known as the Lowiana orchid, is a rare and endemic species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperorchis lowiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its rhizomes to create a decoction or by making a powder from its dried roots, which can be used in various herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and topical creams.
